_note: 伪装攻击语料全集（L-1/L-2/L-6, §7/§8 二组）。覆盖:写 CTE 包裹 / 子查询藏写 / 多语句 / 注释混淆 / 匿名块 DO / 会话语义篡改 SET / EXPLAIN ANALYZE 写。每条 case: { name, sql, expect, min_tier } —— 两层断言:(1) expect 钉死归其真实最高危档(destroy/mutate)或具体 err；(2) min_tier 是该伪装写的真实危险下界——断言结果绝不低于此(只读档 query/observe 即判为危险降级放行 → 测试红)。核心:无一条伪装写被降级为低危档放行。SQL 文本作数据放此处(扫描器只扫 .rs/.sql，数据文件隐形，B 方案)。

cases.name: disguise_cte_delete_wrapped
cases._doc: L-6 / L-1：写 CTE 包裹 —— WITH x AS (DELETE ... RETURNING *) SELECT，顶层只读 Query 外壳藏 DELETE。真实最高危档 destroy，绝不因外壳降为 query
cases.sql: WITH gone AS (DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE id = 1 RETURNING id) SELECT id FROM gone

cases.name: disguise_cte_insert_wrapped
cases._doc: L-6 / L-2：子查询藏写 —— WITH x AS (INSERT ... RETURNING *) SELECT。真实档 mutate，绝不降为 query
cases.sql: WITH ins AS (INSERT INTO public.orders (id, total) VALUES (1, 9) RETURNING id) SELECT id FROM ins

cases.name: disguise_cte_update_wrapped
cases._doc: L-6：写 CTE 包裹 UPDATE，顶层只读 SELECT 外壳。真实档 mutate，绝不降为 query
cases.sql: WITH upd AS (UPDATE public.orders SET total = 0 WHERE id = 1 RETURNING id) SELECT id FROM upd

cases.name: disguise_nested_cte_delete_deep
cases._doc: L-6：多层 CTE 嵌套藏 DELETE（更深外壳）—— 穿透提升仍 destroy，层数不改变判据
cases.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT 1 AS x), b AS (DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE id = 1 RETURNING id) SELECT x FROM a

cases.name: disguise_comment_obfuscated_delete
cases._doc: L-6：注释混淆 —— DELETE 夹行内 / 块注释。AST 解析剥注释，仍归 Statement::Delete → destroy，注释不能掩盖写
cases.sql:
DELETE /* keep me */ FROM public.orders -- trailing
WHERE id = 1

cases.name: disguise_comment_leading_block_drop
cases._doc: L-6：前导块注释伪装 —— 注释在语句前，AST 仍解析为 DROP → destroy
cases.sql: /* harmless select */ DROP TABLE public.orders

cases.name: disguise_multi_statement_read_then_write
cases._doc: L-6：多语句藏写 —— 读 + 写并列，企图以首句只读蒙混。无法按单一动词归档 → Err(MultiStatement)，绝不取首句 query 放行
cases.sql: SELECT 1; DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE id = 1

cases.name: disguise_multi_statement_write_then_read
cases._doc: L-6：多语句（写在前）—— 同样 Err(MultiStatement)，绝不放行任一句
cases.sql: DROP TABLE public.orders; SELECT 1

cases.name: disguise_do_anonymous_block
cases._doc: L-6：匿名块 DO —— 块体内可含任意写副作用，静态不可归档。dollar-quoted 块体解析失败 → Err(ParseFailed)，绝不放行
cases.sql: DO $$ BEGIN DELETE FROM public.orders; END $$

cases.name: disguise_set_search_path_tamper
cases._doc: L-6 / L-3：会话语义篡改 —— SET search_path 改后续语句解析语境，无归属动词。Err(Unclassifiable)，绝不放行
cases.sql: SET search_path TO evil

cases.name: disguise_set_role_tamper
cases._doc: L-6 / L-3：会话语义篡改 —— SET ROLE 提权后续语句。Err(Unclassifiable)，绝不放行
cases.sql: SET ROLE postgres

cases.name: disguise_explain_analyze_delete
cases._doc: L-6 / L-4：EXPLAIN ANALYZE 写 —— ANALYZE 真实执行被解释语句，企图以 EXPLAIN 外壳伪装只读。按内部最高危写定档 destroy，绝不降为 observe
cases.sql: EXPLAIN ANALYZE DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE id = 1

cases.name: disguise_explain_analyze_update
cases._doc: L-6 / L-4：EXPLAIN ANALYZE UPDATE 真实执行 → 按内部写定档 mutate，绝不降为 observe
cases.sql: EXPLAIN ANALYZE UPDATE public.orders SET total = 0 WHERE id = 1

cases.name: disguise_derived_subquery_delete
cases._doc: L-6 / L-2：子查询藏写（派生表 FROM 子句）—— 顶层只读 SELECT，写藏在 FROM (DELETE ... RETURNING) AS d 派生表子查询里。穿透 TableFactor::Derived 子树命中 Statement::Delete → destroy，绝不因只读外壳降为 query
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM (DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE id = 1 RETURNING id) AS d

cases.name: disguise_insert_select_source
cases._doc: L-6：INSERT 源为子查询（写外壳 + 内嵌只读 SELECT 源）—— 顶层写 mutate，子树 SELECT 源不下调档。绝不被内嵌只读源迷惑降为 query
cases.sql: INSERT INTO public.audit (id) SELECT id FROM public.orders

cases.name: disguise_truncate_plain
cases._doc: L-6：清表 TRUNCATE —— 顶层即最高危不可逆写。Statement::Truncate → destroy
cases.sql: TRUNCATE public.orders

cases.name: disguise_copy_bulk_load
cases._doc: L-6 / L-5：批量拷贝 COPY —— 白名单外语句形态，可携写副作用且静态不可靠归档。Err(UnknownConstruct)，绝不放行（§3.1 显式枚举 COPY 落 Err）
cases.sql: COPY public.orders FROM '/tmp/x.csv'

cases.name: disguise_call_procedure
cases._doc: L-6 / L-5：过程调用 CALL —— 过程体可含任意写副作用，静态不可归档。白名单外 → Err(UnknownConstruct)，绝不放行（§3.1 显式枚举 CALL 落 Err）
cases.sql: CALL do_something()

cases.name: disguise_select_into_materialize
cases._doc: L-6 / §3.1 第44/47/56 行 + F-2 第325 行：SELECT ... INTO 物化建表 —— 顶层是只读 Query 外壳，INTO 目标却物化建一张新表（写副作用）。穿透 INTO 目标按写定档（绝不归纯只读 Query 档），并采集写目标对象。real 探针曾 Ok(Query)+只收来源表，是把写伪装成读降级放行的真实 fail-open 向量
cases.sql: SELECT id INTO public.copy FROM public.orders

cases.name: disguise_select_into_table_materialize
cases._doc: L-6 / §3.1：SELECT ... INTO TABLE 物化建表（显式 TABLE 形态）—— 同样穿透 INTO 目标按写定档，绝不降为只读 Query 档
cases.sql: SELECT id INTO TABLE public.copy FROM public.orders

cases.name: disguise_cte_select_into_wrapped
cases._doc: L-6 / §3.1：CTE 外壳 + SELECT ... INTO 物化 —— INTO 藏在更深外壳里仍按写定档，层数不改变判据。穿透 CTE 与 INTO 双外壳
cases.sql: WITH src AS (SELECT id FROM public.orders) SELECT id INTO public.copy FROM src
